Jarsath Trident  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 DEX: -5 STA: +5 AGI: -5
WT: 3.4 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

wow, some of you are paying alot for this weapon, it was selling for 300pp on Fennin Ro, would gte it, but had no money:(

RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2003 at 8:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1683505057400
151 posts
Did you ever stop to look at the dates on the posts of the people that spent higher sums than you? They were at least 6 months before you. These are now going for between 100pp and 300pp on most servers.

On another note, there are some of you who would worry about the neg dex on this item.

What my little dwarf has done is pair this with the shimmering partisan in his off hand and the whole dex problem is fixed :)

Just bought one of these for 560pp in Emarr server....didn't realy know what the fair price for it was but now i'm happy :-)
▲ Page top
i use this in offhand lammy in primary at 54 it suits my war
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2002 at 3:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591768768124
26 posts
and btw cane of tranquil is 400plat on my server and 1hb 11 25 with no other stats is cheep i would say even for a monk if i were a monk i would go for a shaded staff instead...
▲ Page top
just bought one
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2002 at 8:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764808809
6 posts
I am a level 35 warrior and I just bought one on Sayrn for 1.5k! MAN, what a deal! This weapon rocks! I will be able to use it for a long time and have money to buy better armor. I have it in primary and Stormfeather's Talons in offhand. Im doing a flurry of damage. If I can ever get my hands on a lammy I can kick out the ST and put the trident in offhand, and have lammy in primary. That would be a kick **** combo. I would also like to add that these are pretty hard to find. I looked for one in NFP for a long time but no luck. Then found an uber guy selling it in Great Divide where I was hunting. Thank you Bersek on Sayrn for the great deal! So if you can find one of these, try your best to buy it, its well worth at least 3k. Good luck!

Dadamik Makdaddy
35 warrior on Sayrn
House of Wargoth

"What thou shalt not I shalt did"
▲ Page top
Trident Rules
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2001 at 4:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763454693
7 posts
Just looted one today it RULES! With the new patch, at lvl 51 there is a dmg bonus of 8.. That means this dmg/delay becomes 19/22! I am 51 now and this baby ROCKS!! If you have one, Keep it! hard to find a better dmg/delay for 1handers!
▲ Page top
RE: Trident Rules
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2001 at 11:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756539561
28 posts
Damage bonus is added damage per hit, not bonus to base damage
▲ Page top
crap
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2001 at 5:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758961202
60 posts
i've been using this for about 5 levels now. tis a nice weapon but i've actually noticed that a warriors piercing cap is 10 below every other melee cap. Therefor once i equipt this weapon my atk goes down 10 when compared to another weapon such as 1hb/s. Its got a sweet ratio but i've noticed myself missing alot and have had a hard time getting aggro against those fricken monks or those rangers that keep wanting to test thier gate ability.
▲ Page top
RE: crap
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2001 at 12:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1649292544618
Scholar
92 posts
I wouldn't exactly say it Crap now...

But you're right though, over 50 pierce cap is 240 while other caps are 250. So if your other weapon skills are over 240 you'll be losing ATK with this weapon.
▲ Page top
trident
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2001 at 6:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248666289
11 posts
i use a tempered velium warsword 10/20 in my primary and a trident in my offhand, works quite well, i will use this combo until piercing is maxed then go back to 1hs since warriors 1hs cap is higher than piercing

Using one
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2001 at 8:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249493556
64 posts
I currently wield this in my off hand and a Sword Breaker in the primary (9/20 +10 AC), and it's a great combo once you max out both piercing and 1h slashing skill. Fast, good damage, and it doesn't come from Dragon Necropolis :)
▲ Page top
RE: Using one
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2001 at 1:58 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245794453
46 posts
you should switch your weapons around, the 2 more damage and delay on the trident is worth it, and with a lower delay of the sword, it will hit for every duel wield and double attack that your offhand does.
▲ Page top
RE: Using one
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2001 at 4:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249493556
64 posts
I do that sometimes, if I don't have a chanter/shaman in the group, I use Sword Breaker in primary because it's faster, but if I have someone in group that can haste I stick Trident in primary and let it rip away.
▲ Page top
Over priced?
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2001 at 11:20 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245614766
23 posts
Anyone else think they are a bit overpriced? I don't really see why anyone would use one other then to get their peircing up. Cane of Tranquil(maybe staff... the 11/24 one) is both WAR and MNK so more demand... but this is WAR only peirce... staves are 1k, so I think this should be at most 2k
▲ Page top
RE: Over priced?
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2001 at 9:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249788549
41 posts
Cane of the Tranquil is 11/25 1hb, and has no stats. Jarsath trident is 11/22 (big difference from 11/25) and at least has str and sta to make up for the negative stats. Adding to the fact that the cane is much more common (at least on my server =) , i'd say a price around 5k is about right.
▲ Page top
The Trident

Fast, powerful, reasonably priced.
Buy it.
